titolo: Giza-Shanghai: La Piramide e la Torre
contenuto:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 600" width="100%" height="100%">
  <rect width="800" height="600" fill="#07080d"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="480" x2="800" y2="480" stroke="#3a2e2b" stroke-width="2"/>
  <polygon points="100,480 250,280 400,480" fill="none" stroke="#d4a373" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="4 2"/>
  <polygon points="300,480 420,320 540,480" fill="none" stroke="#b5838d" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <polygon points="500,480 580,380 660,480" fill="none" stroke="#8d7966" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="250" y1="480" x2="250" y2="80" stroke="#00b4d8" stroke-width="3" stroke-opacity="0.8"/>
  <line x1="265" y1="480" x2="265" y2="140" stroke="#48cae4" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <line x1="235" y1="480" x2="235" y2="180" stroke="#0077b6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <line x1="420" y1="480" x2="420" y2="100" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="80" r="4" fill="#caf0f8"/>
  <circle cx="420" cy="100" r="3" fill="#ffb703"/>
  <rect x="50" y="490" width="700" height="4" fill="#d62828" opacity="0.8"/>
  <rect x="50" y="498" width="700" height="2" fill="#ffb703" opacity="0.9"/>
  <rect x="50" y="504" width="700" height="8" fill="#111115" opacity="0.95"/>
  <text x="250" y="60" fill="#00b4d8" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">SHANGHAI // FREQUENZA</text>
  <text x="250" y="525" fill="#d4a373" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">GIZA // DURATA</text>
  <text x="400" y="565" fill="#f8f9fa" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" opacity="0.6">LA PIETRA INERTE E LA TORRE DI LUCE</text>
</svg>
